about.meta_title: About YumiScan — The story behind the app
about.meta_description: Discover why YumiScan was created after a life-changing trip to Japan, to help people understand what they eat and avoid the stress of allergens and strict diets.
about.title: About YumiScan
about.subtitle: An app born from a trip, a real frustration, and one clear obsession: knowing what you eat.
about.hero_intro: YumiScan was built for people who do not want to buy or eat blindly when their health, values, or lifestyle are on the line.
about.story_p1: I had dreamed of traveling to Japan since childhood. When I finally got to live that trip the way I had imagined it, I wanted to fully enjoy it: explore, shop, discover, and taste everything I could.
about.story_p2: But every time I bought food, the same friction came back: I had to translate ingredients again and again. When you follow a strict diet, shopping quickly becomes stressful, slow, and frustrating.
about.story_p3: Once I returned from Japan, the idea became obvious: build a tool that helps people understand food labels quickly, without improvising every single time.
about.mission_p1: YumiScan helps remove the frustration linked to diets, allergens, and personal food restrictions. The goal is not only to scan text, but to restore peace of mind when buying food.
about.mission_p2: Knowing what you eat means better protecting your health, respecting your moral choices, and avoiding risky or unnecessary mistakes.
about.founder_p1: I am an Italian software engineer based in France. YumiScan came from a real-world problem first, then became a useful product designed for everyday life.
about.founder_p2: The ambition is simple: create a fast, reassuring and accessible experience for anyone who needs to verify what they consume before buying.

audience_items.1: People living with food allergies or intolerances.
audience_items.2: Travelers and expats dealing with labels they cannot easily read.
audience_items.3: People following a specific diet for health, ethical, or personal reasons.
audience_items.4: Anyone who wants to buy food with more clarity and less uncertainty.

principles_items.1: Remove the feeling of buying food blindly without really understanding it.
principles_items.2: Reduce the stress that comes with shopping in unfamiliar environments.
principles_items.3: Help people make choices that are more aligned with their health and values.
principles_items.4: Make ingredient labels faster, easier and more reassuring to read.

about.reassurance_title: A decision aid, not a replacement
about.reassurance_p1: YumiScan is designed as a practical way to better read and interpret ingredient lists. In the case of severe allergies or uncertainty, checking the original packaging remains essential.

guest.title: Stop buying food blindly
guest.description: Create your account, set your allergen profile, and let AI help you read a label before you head to checkout.

user.title: Your next scan can start right now
user.description: Your profile is already ready. Open the AI scanner and get a clearer answer before you buy.

terms.meta_description: Read YumiScan’s Terms of Sale: scan credits, Stripe payments, withdrawal rights, refunds, and seller information.
terms.title: Terms of Sale
terms.subtitle: Consumer sale of YumiScan scan credits.
terms.intro_notice: These terms apply only to the purchase of scan credits on YumiScan. They complement the Terms of Service governing use of the app.
terms.credit_offer_p1: YumiScan sells digital scan credits that allow users to launch food label scans inside the application. Available packs and pricing are displayed at checkout.
terms.credit_offer_p2: No recurring subscription is required. Users purchase credits through one-off packs only.
terms.payment_p1: Payment is processed securely by Stripe. YumiScan does not store any card details.
terms.payment_p2: An order is considered confirmed as soon as Stripe validates the payment and the user account receives the corresponding credits.
terms.credits_p1: Each scan consumes one credit according to the service rules. Free credits are used before paid credits only when the daily credit is no longer available.
terms.credits_p2: Paid credits do not expire as long as the user account remains active.
terms.refund_p1: Because scan credits are digital and activated immediately after payment, service execution starts without delay once the order is confirmed.
terms.refund_p2: Except where mandatory law provides otherwise, credits already added to the account are non-refundable. In case of payment issues or missing credits, the user must use the Contact page before starting any bank dispute or chargeback process.
terms.liability_p1: YumiScan sells a right to use digital credits in order to access an analysis service. The publisher’s liability remains limited under the Terms of Service and applicable law.
terms.support_p1: For any question about an order, a payment, or the use of credits, the user can use YumiScan’s Contact page.
terms.law_p1: These Terms of Sale are governed by French law. In the event of a dispute and after an attempt at amicable resolution, the competent French courts may be seized.
terms.footer: YumiScan Terms of Sale — Public current version
